title: Level 968
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Level 968:}}
="The Darkness Of The Cosmos Bursts With Light, Join This Space Odyssey With Your Lincoln Continental, & Maybe You Will Become A Voyager." =













{{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage1.webp|width=800px|caption=The Cronians bid you farewell on your last voyage. Cars pass. Cities buzz. The darkness of space is rife with light.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage2.webp|width=800px|caption=As thousands of miles pass, the city hides under the horizon line, and you eat, entertain yourself, sleep, and then wake yourself up to the eyes of the God of the Ocean glaring at you as Andromeda stands idly by in the distance.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage3.webp|width=800px|caption=Andromeda consumes you. Cliffs materialise around you as earthly nature continues to blend with the emptiness of space.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage4.webp|width=800px|caption=The smog of nebulae wraps around the desert atmosphere. Foreign planets align, and the nearby star illuminates it all beautifully.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage5.webp|width=800px|caption=You close in on one of the planets. It looks familiar. Your camera appears to be breaking. Its images are of varying quality and look.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage6.webp|width=800px|caption=You orbit the planet. Clouds twirl and give way to the blue below. A giant patch of yellow and a boot catch your attention. It jogs your memory. You feel like you are reaching for something so close, yet so far.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage7.webp|width=800px|caption=You keep forgetting that this car drives on its own. The road slowly tilts away from the planet. You struggle to figure out what the boot reminds you of. You lull yourself to sleep.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage8.webp|width=800px|caption=You wake up, panicked. Why are you in a car? Are you being kidnapped? Why is the sky so dark? Why can you see planets so close? The reminder hits you. You write a note to make sure you don't forget. You try to eat a cracker, but you forget how to swallow, and spit it back out. You go hungry for the day.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage9.webp|width=800px|caption=The Cronians come by to say hi to you. You barely know who they are. They leave, worried. You flip-flop between being able to eat and being unable to. Between panicking about why you are in a car, and then not.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage10.webp|width=800px|caption=The Cronians come by to say hi to you again. You get angry and tell them to leave. The things are upset, but oblige. You make them more worried. You see a rainbow planet in the distance. You hope the road you are being taken on gets close to it. You look down. The patch of green and yellow below jogs your memory like the article of clothing from before.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage11.webp|width=800px|caption=You forget how to breathe.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage12.webp|width=800px|caption=The Cronians try to help you, but they can't. In your struggle, you rub too hard against the steering wheel, and the car turns towards the barrier. It won't turn back to its regular course on time.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage13.webp|width=800px|caption=The car drives off the highway and begins to take flight in the vacuum of space. You remind yourself of how to breathe, but you are now beyond saving. You begin to sob. The Cronians won't reach you. Nobody will ever reach you.|bg-size=1600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage14.webp|width=800px|caption=Nobody will ever reach you.|bg-size=1600px}} [[File:RetroSpaceImage14.webp|400x400px]]

{{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage15.webp|width=800px|caption=But maybe ''you'' can reach something.|bg-size=1600px}}
[[File:RetroSpaceImage16.webp|3x3px]]
You saw a pale dot from afar. A lone, pale dot. Surrounded on all sides by darkness as the many beautiful lights you once saw began to fade into a tiny point behind you.
[[File:RetroSpaceImage16.webp|6x6px]]
One point shrunk, the other grew.
[[File:RetroSpaceImage16.webp|12x12px]]
It mesmerised you. Maybe, perhaps, you aren't alone.
[[File:RetroSpaceImage16.webp|25x25px]]
As you neared it, its details began to unveil further. The circular shape it held began to break down.
[[File:RetroSpaceImage16.webp|100x100px]]
Rods jutted out of from a central core. You could make out something akin to a white bowl.
[[File:RetroSpaceImage16.webp|200x200px]]
And then it hit you. {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage16.webp|width=300px|caption=Your foggy mind began to strangle you once more, but you felt comfortable.|bg-size=600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage16.webp|width=600px|caption=For you could spend your final moments with active, comforting company, something that, despite not showing it, buzzed the same way as you. Felt the same struggles as you. Voyaged like you.|bg-size=600px}} {{Blurimage|align=center|file=RetroSpaceImage16.webp|width=1000px|caption=Was you.|bg-size=2000px}}
